description: Non-negotiable security baseline for every Sovereign-generated app.
rules: RLS (Row Level Security) enabled with explicit policies on every Supabase table
No direct client-to-database access — all writes and reads go through server-side API routes
No secrets in client code — service role keys and API keys are server-side only
Server-side auth validation on every protected request — never trust client-supplied user IDs
Server-side input validation on every public endpoint — type, length, required fields
Secure HTTP headers via vercel.json: Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options
CSP must include connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co — missing connect-src blocks all Supabase calls
Rate limiting on every API route — IP-based, with Retry-After header on 429 responses
Soft deletes on all user-data tables (deleted_at column) — never hard delete user data
Security audit comment block at the top of every API route file

checklist.fix: ALTER TABLE t ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY with explicit policies

checklist.item: No service_role key in src/ directory
checklist.fix: Move to api/ route using process.env only

checklist.item: Rate limiting on all public API routes
checklist.fix: Import checkRateLimit from _rateLimit.js, add as first handler check

checklist.item: CSP header includes connect-src with Supabase wildcard
checklist.fix: Add connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co to vercel.json

checklist.item: Input validation on all req.body fields
checklist.fix: Validate type, length, and required fields before processing

checklist.item: Auth check on all protected routes
checklist.fix: Verify token/session server-side before executing any protected action
Use safe alternatives — textContent, sanitized markdown renderer
Replace all http:// with https:// in vercel.json and env vars

checklist.item: Soft deletes on user data tables
checklist.fix: ALTER TABLE t ADD COLUMN deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NULL

references: CVE-2025-48757 — 170+ apps exposed due to missing Supabase RLS on a competing platform
OWASP Top 10 — A01:2021 Broken Access Control (RLS violations fall here)
OWASP Top 10 — A02:2021 Cryptographic Failures (secrets in client code)
OWASP Top 10 — A05:2021 Security Misconfiguration (missing CSP headers)
sovereign_lesson: Every lesson about missing RLS, exposed secrets, or missing rate limiting from CLAUDE.md is encoded here. These rules exist because each was violated in production in the first 30 days of Sovereign.
